description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MiNiFi-CPP CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments including macOS with Xcode, Windows with VS2019, and several Ubuntu 20.04 configurations with different compilers and settings. Each job should check out the code, set up caching, install dependencies, and then build, test, and lint the project with specific configurations.
